channel.title: research on Utsab Karan
channel.description: Recent content in research on Utsab Karan

item.title: First Conference Experience
item.description: I attended the Indian Control Conference from 17th to 20th December 2025 at IISc, Bangalore. This was my first conference ever — and also my first time in Bangalore. I was there to present a paper I worked on during my summer internship at IIT Bombay (long story, will tell some other time). Arrival & Accommodation The first thing I did after reaching campus was sort out my accommodation.
